name: @ironforge/workflow-deprovision-failed
description: Workflow task Lambda — Phase 1.5 deprovisioning SFN terminal-failure handler. Writes Service deprovisioning → failed (failedWorkflow="deprovisioning") and Job running → failed. Does NOT re-run the destroy chain — that would mask the originating failure or hit inconsistent partial-destroy state. Recovery is operator-driven via re-issuing DELETE.
